# Vyre Op Catalog

Auto-generated by `cargo xtask catalog`. One table per subsystem; each row is a registered `OpEntry` drawn from `vyre-primitives` (Tier 2.5), `vyre-libs` (Tier 3), and `vyre-intrinsics` (Tier 2) inventories.
